element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns tuning affects race performance before first race
Weather conditions communicated before race; mandatory pit stop mid-race forces player to make tire choice under pressure
Player must navigate pit lane during active race, balancing speed with tire change timing

element_introduction_order.element: 11 AI rival drivers with team affiliations
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each rival has consistent team colors and performance characteristics across season
Player races through authentic historical F1 calendar against same 11 rivals

typical_tension_triggers: Weather changes requiring tire strategy adjustment
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Strategic resource management (tire wear) creates recurring tension cycles within each race; season-long progression builds narrative pressure through cumulative championship points

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like initial races allow player to learn tire mechanics and pit strategy on easier opponents
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Rival AI performance increases as season progresses; tire strategy becomes more critical on varied track layouts
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship-deciding races require flawless execution and optimal tire/tuning decisions against consistent 11-driver field
notable_spikes: First mandatory pit stop teaches time management under pressure
Rain weather condition introduction forces new tire selection strategy
Final season races where championship is decided by points accumulation

notable_level_patterns.description: Player races one-off race on selected track; simplest difficulty entry point; allows practice without championship pressure
Full 1992 F1 season calendar; player races against same 11 rivals across multiple tracks; cumulative points determine championship winner; introduces narrative continuity and rival familiarity
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Brazilian Grand Prix through Australian Grand Prix (1992 calendar)

notable_level_patterns.description: Time trial or free practice on specific track; no rivals; allows skill development on tire management and track memorization without competitive pressure
Mid-race mandatory pit stop creates discrete tension moment; player must decide tire choice, enter pit lane safely, execute stop, exit and rejoin race flow
